description:
What: When total bit length is statically computable (literal sizes, or compile-time-known var sizes), allocate bitstring at caller and write fields directly into dst. Coordinates with the existing ConstBitstring constant-folding path.

CLIF impact: strict reduction for sized bitstrings.

Removes: builder-pattern allocation for sized bitstrings.

Tests: golden CLIF on fixed-size bitstring construction; non-sized bitstrings still use existing path.
title: fz-dps.F2: DPS for MakeBitstring when total bit-length is known
